title: Litigation Evidence Management System Review: EvidencePro vs CaseLocker 2026 Comparison
description: Compare EvidencePro and CaseLocker litigation evidence management systems. Analyze evidence collection, evidence chain management, evidence display, and ev
content:
Litigation Evidence Management System Overview

Litigation evidence management systems help lawyers organize, manage, and display case evidence. In 2026, EvidencePro and CaseLocker are two leading professional products. This review compares their evidence management features.

Evidence Collection Features

Collection FeaturesEvidenceProCaseLocker
Evidence EntryMultiple format support, batch importBasic format entry
Evidence TagsMulti-dimensional tags, smart classificationSingle tags
Evidence TimelineVisual timeline displayBasic time sorting
Evidence AssociationAuto association analysisManual association

Evidence Chain Management

EvidencePro provides complete evidence chain tracking, evidence source recording, and evidence integrity verification. CaseLocker has basic evidence chain features. For strict evidence chain management, EvidencePro is recommended.

Evidence Display

EvidencePro supports courtroom evidence display, evidence visualization, and evidence animation demonstration. CaseLocker has basic display features. For courtroom presentation, EvidencePro is recommended for litigation lawyers.

Evidence Sharing

EvidencePro supports team collaboration sharing, client evidence sharing, and expert evidence sharing. CaseLocker has limited sharing features. For team collaboration litigation, EvidencePro's sharing solution is recommended.

Mobile Support

EvidencePro has complete mobile support for field evidence collection. CaseLocker mobile is limited to viewing. For field evidence collection, EvidencePro is recommended.

Price and Selection

EvidencePro annual fee: 120,000 CNY; CaseLocker annual fee: 60,000 CNY. For complex litigation and team collaboration, choose EvidencePro. For simple cases with limited budget, choose CaseLocker.
author: Litigation Lawyer Consultant
